common.app_description: Home task management and organization app
common.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete?
common.modal_default_title: Choose one small task and keep moving
common.modal_default_subtitle: Calm home = calm mind. Just 5 more focused minutes.

validation.password_min: Password must be at least {{min}} characters
validation.date_past: Date must be in the past
validation.date_future: Date must be in the future
validation.server_error: Server error, please try again later

pwa.install_description: Install the app to your home screen for quick access

rooms.title: Home
rooms.no_rooms_description: Start by adding your first room

subtitles.kitchen: Kitchen — small order that calms the day
subtitles.bedroom: Bedroom — calm starts in the closet
subtitles.balcony: Balcony — a light corner to clear your mind
subtitles.kids: Kids room — one toy at a time
subtitles.laundry: Laundry — a few calm minutes of folding
subtitles.default: Personal space for a calm daily reset

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.title_suggestions_group_label: Matching titles from your saved tasks
tasks.title_suggestions_empty: No saved titles match these letters
tasks.no_tasks_description: Add your first task to this room
tasks.due_date_min_today_hint: You can choose today or a future date only.
tasks.due_date_min_today_error: Due date cannot be in the past. Choose today or a later date.
tasks.all_list_no_tasks_sub: Add your first task to get started

auth.google_unavailable: Google login is unavailable right now. Please try again.
auth.sign_in_failed: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
auth.no_access_token: Unable to complete sign-in right now.
auth.storage_failed: Unable to save sign-in details in this browser.
auth.server_error_temp: Temporary server issue. Please try again shortly.
auth.network_unreachable: Unable to reach the server. Please try again shortly.
auth.no_server_response: No response from server right now. Please try again shortly.
auth.temp_error: A temporary error occurred. Please try again.
auth.login_page_subtitle: Continue building a calmer, more organized home.
auth.register_incomplete: Unable to complete registration right now.
auth.register_failed_generic: We couldn't complete registration. Please try again.
auth.register_page_subtitle: Start building a calmer, organized home.

settings.title: Settings
settings.export_description: Download all your data in JSON format
settings.delete_account_warning: This action is irreversible and will delete all your data

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.confirmCreateGoogleFromTask: Create a Google Calendar event from this task?
calendar.noTaskDueDate: This task has no due date.
calendar.googleEventCreateFail: Failed to create Google Calendar event
calendar.failedCreateEvent: We could not create the calendar event.

privacy.consent_warning_desc: This feature sends data to an external service. Only minimal information (no identifying details) is sent.
privacy.external_service_desc: Data is sent to {{service}} for AI processing. Data is not stored permanently and is not used for model training.
privacy.gdpr_compliant: This is GDPR compliant - only minimal and necessary information is sent.

layout.inventoryKicker: Optional supplies catalog — works alongside categories; open Categories for your main organizing flow.
layout.progressText: Today you checked off {{count}} tasks — nice work, keep your own pace.
layout.dailyTipText: Five minutes in one room calms the whole home.
layout.focusIntro: Pick a small task, set a duration, and see if you can finish on time. Goal: short, steady wins.
layout.focusPrefixHint: Type up to 3 letters: each letter narrows the list to tasks whose title starts with those letters (from all categories).
layout.focusTaskListAria: Choose a pending task for this timer
layout.focusNoMatches: No tasks match these letters — try fewer letters or clear the filter.
layout.focusNoOpenTasks: No open tasks yet — you can still run the timer with “Manual pick”.
layout.focusHint: Tip: choose something small and concrete.
layout.focusSuccess: Nice! On time. Mark the task done and keep going.
layout.logoAlt: Eli Maor — The Art of Tidying
layout.categoriesQuickMenuAria: Product categories — quick links to each area
layout.categoriesNavRailAria: Category navigation — go to all categories or a specific category

roomsPage.noRoomsSub: Create your first room to get started.
roomsPage.tagline: Every room is a fresh start.
roomsPage.createSub: Start with a space that matters to you right now.
roomsPage.createFail: Could not create the room right now.
roomsPage.mapSub: Tap a room on the map to open its tasks.
roomsPage.mapTapHint: Tap a room to open tasks
roomsPage.ideas1: Pick one room to focus on this week.
roomsPage.ideas2: Add one tiny task per room.
roomsPage.ideas3: Start with the room that brings the most calm.
roomsPage.networkError: Can't reach the server. Check that the API is running.

roomPage.roomDesc: Tasks, a quick tip, and a matching video.
roomPage.noTasks: No tasks in this room yet.
roomPage.watchVideoSub: A short pick for this room.
roomPage.youtubeThumbOpenAria: Open the video on YouTube in a new tab
roomPage.invalidRoom: This room id doesn't look valid.
roomPage.tip_kitchen: Start with one drawer: keep, donate, or toss.
roomPage.tip_bedroom: Fold just 10 items. Small wins build momentum.
roomPage.tip_living: Clear one visible surface first for instant calm.
roomPage.tip_default: Pick a tiny corner and set a 5-minute timer.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.sharingSub: Add someone by email to share room tasks.
settingsPage.homeSuppliesBody: Track quantities and photos by storage zone — optional alongside categories.

visionBoard.title: My vision board
visionBoard.hint: Describe how you want your home to feel. You can edit anytime.
visionBoard.loadError: Could not load your vision board.
visionBoard.saveError: Could not save. Check your connection.

emotionalJournal.categoryContextLine: You’re inside the Emotional category flow: reflective tasks and items you’re considering releasing.
emotionalJournal.title: Reflection journal
emotionalJournal.subtitle: Gentle prompts before letting go — aligned with your Emotional category.
emotionalJournal.q1: Why am I keeping this item?

taskList.emptyHint: This is a great moment to add one small task.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

home.title: Home organization
home.subtitle: All your tasks and categories in one place. Start with one important action and keep moving.
home.noRooms: No linked areas yet. Open Categories to add a storage area and start organizing.

visionSchedule.intro: A week view with hours: your tasks alongside Google Calendar. When your calendar is connected you see busy times and can place home tasks in free slots instead of random times.
visionSchedule.connectBody: To see your personal schedule here, connect Google (calendar permission). You can also do this from Settings.
visionSchedule.googleHint: Loaded {{count}} calendar events in this window — blue blocks show when you’re busy.
visionSchedule.googleHintSub: Tasks with a due datetime appear in brown; drag them to reschedule.
visionSchedule.googleEmptyNote: If you expected events but see none, your calendar may not be linked — use “Connect Google Calendar”.
visionSchedule.footerHint: Tip: select an empty slot to create a task at that time. Click a Google event to create a task from it.
visionSchedule.mediaSectionAria: Upload photos and videos for your vision board
visionSchedule.mediaSubtitle: Upload images or videos from your computer, laptop, or phone (gallery or camera). Files stay on this device only — per user.
visionSchedule.mediaLimitsHint: Up to {{max}} items · images up to ~{{maxImgMb}}MB · videos up to ~{{maxVidMb}}MB. Images or video only.
visionSchedule.mediaEmpty: Nothing uploaded yet — use the buttons above.
visionSchedule.mediaNeedLogin: Sign in to save personal photos and videos on your vision board.
visionSchedule.mediaMaxItems: You’ve reached the maximum of {{max}} items. Remove one to add another.
visionSchedule.mediaErrorType: Please choose an image or video file only.
visionSchedule.mediaErrorSizeImage: Image is too large. Try a smaller file (up to ~{{maxImgMb}} MB).
visionSchedule.mediaErrorSizeVideo: Video is too large. Try a smaller file (up to ~{{maxVidMb}} MB).
visionSchedule.mediaUploadFailed: Could not save the file. Try again or pick another file.

inventory.title: Supplies & home catalog
inventory.subtitle: Track quantities and photos by storage zone — optional alongside categories.
inventory.photoUrlHint: Or paste an image URL if the photo is already online.
inventory.photoUploadSuccess: Image uploaded. You can save the item when everything looks right.
inventory.photoUploadFailed: Could not upload the image. Try a smaller file or a different format.
inventory.photoUploadTypeError: Please choose an image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF).
inventory.addHomeItemToInventory: Add a home item to inventory
inventory.addItemFormHint: Pick an area above, fill in the details, then tap the button — the item is saved to that area’s inventory.
inventory.noAreas: No areas yet. Add your first area.
inventory.noItems: No items in this area yet.

hub.pageSubtitle: Pick a category to focus on.
hub.browseSub: Tap a category to see tasks when a matching area exists.
hub.notLinked: No matching area yet — add one below.
hub.idea1: Pick one category to finish a tiny win today.
hub.idea2: Name new areas with clear words (e.g. “Kitchen”, “Kids toys”) so linking works.
hub.idea3: Pair physical sorting with one calendar block this week.
hub.createAreaSub: Creates a legacy room row used for tasks — choose a name that matches a category when possible.
hub.areaNamePlaceholder: e.g. Kitchen, Kids toys, Shoes closet
hub.linkedCardsSub: Quick access to areas that already exist in your account.

detail.invalidBody: This category key is not part of the catalog.
detail.unlinkedLine: No storage area is linked to this category yet. Go back to the categories page and add an area whose name matches this category.
detail.noLinkBody: Add a storage area whose name matches this category (for example “Kitchen” for Kitchen), then return here.
detail.taskLibrarySubtitle: Ideas from the built-in library — tap to prefill a new task.
detail.categoryVideoSub: Recommended clip for this category — watch below or open on YouTube with the button.

emotionalCategory.journalCardBody: Capture items, feelings, and “spark joy” notes here — it’s part of your Emotional category, not a separate app.
emotionalCategory.journalPromptHint: Treat each entry as a small reflective task before you let things go.
emotionalCategory.unlinkedBody: Linking an area (e.g. “Emotional” or “Sentimental”) lets you attach tasks to this category. Journaling works either way.

contentSupport.pageSubtitle: Short picks that support your categories. Choose a media area, then refine — or return to the full category list.
contentSupport.empty: No clips for this filter. Try a broader pick.

dashboard.heroSub: Just 5 minutes a day to bring calm back home.
dashboard.progressSectionSubtitle: Pie chart of how tasks spread across categories; the list shows completion per category.
dashboard.progressDonutAria: Progress donut by category: slice size reflects each category’s completion share (normalized around the circle).
dashboard.progressMixFallbackHint: No completions yet — slices show each category’s share of all tasks (workload mix).
dashboard.progressChartAria: Pie chart: each slice is this category’s share of your tasks
dashboard.progressEmptyBody: Add a few tasks (with room or category names like Kitchen or Closet) to see your category mix here.
dashboard.progressLoadError: Could not load progress. Pull to refresh or try again shortly.
dashboard.progressLoadErrorWithChart: Could not load summary from the server — showing distribution from tasks saved on this device.
dashboard.progressLowDataHint: Nothing completed yet — finish one small task to see your pie slices reflect progress.
dashboard.progressDonutAlwaysHint: The chart is always here — even before you check anything off. Add tasks to see slices by area.
dashboard.progressDonutPlaceholderAria: Empty progress chart — waiting for tasks
dashboard.progressCelebrateDailyToday: You finished every daily task scheduled for today.
dashboard.progressCelebrateDailyOtherDay: You finished every daily task scheduled for this day.
dashboard.progressCelebrateMonthly: You finished every monthly task scheduled for this date — a small monthly win.
dashboard.progressCelebrateBoth: You finished every daily and every monthly task for this day — amazing!
dashboard.beforeAfterSectionSub: Photo pairs from your wins — separate from the unified progress card above.
dashboard.yourDaySub: Quick view of calendar and upcoming tasks.
dashboard.progressTrendAria: Completed tasks per day, last 7 days
dashboard.progressEmptyHint: Complete a task to start your week and streak — small steps count.
dashboard.heroCompactSub: Pick one small win for today — or jump straight into your list below.
dashboard.bucketEmptyDaily: No daily tasks scheduled for this calendar date.
dashboard.bucketEmptyMonthly: No monthly tasks scheduled for this calendar date.
dashboard.allClearForDay: All tasks for this day are done — nice work.
dashboard.weekBarAria: Choose weekday for your task list
dashboard.weekBarHint: Tap a day — the list above shows tasks scheduled for that weekday.
dashboard.weekStripAria: Week view — pick a day to filter your task list
dashboard.weekStripHint: Tap a date in the row — lists above sync to that calendar day (daily/weekly vs monthly).
dashboard.taskDeferredToDay: Task deferred until tomorrow ({{day}}) — same time.
dashboard.taskSwipeDeferHint: On mobile, swipe the card horizontally to defer until tomorrow. On desktop you can also tap “Defer until tomorrow”.

challenge.title: 5-minute reset
challenge.focusLine: One focused stretch. You’ve got this.
challenge.completeSaveError: Could not save completion. Check your connection.
challenge.refreshAfterSaveError: Saved, but could not load the next task. Pull to refresh or try again from the card.
challenge.timerMvpNote: Tip: refreshing the page will reset the timer (MVP).
challenge.successMotivation: Small wins add up. One calm step at a time.
